from app.ai.conversation_memory import latest_landlord_asked_for_phone
import pytest

def test_latest_landlord_asked_for_phone_empty_messages():
    # No messages, expect False (no landlord asked for phone)
    assert latest_landlord_asked_for_phone([]) is False

def test_latest_landlord_asked_for_phone_no_landlord_messages():
    messages = [
        {"sender": "tenant", "text": "Can I see the flat?", "status": "NEW_REPLY"},
        {"sender": "tenant", "text": "When is the viewing?", "status": "NEW_REPLY"},
    ]
    assert latest_landlord_asked_for_phone(messages) is False

def test_latest_landlord_asked_for_phone_landlord_asked_phone():
    messages = [
        {"sender": "tenant", "text": "Is the flat still available?", "status": "NEW_REPLY"},
        {"sender": "landlord", "text": "Can I have your phone number?", "status": "CONTACT_REQUESTED"},
    ]
    assert latest_landlord_asked_for_phone(messages) is True

def test_latest_landlord_asked_for_phone_landlord_asked_phone_but_not_latest():
    messages = [
        {"sender": "landlord", "text": "Can I have your phone number?", "status": "CONTACT_REQUESTED"},
        {"sender": "tenant", "text": "Yes, it is 123456789", "status": "PHONE_ACQUIRED"},
        {"sender": "landlord", "text": "Thanks!", "status": "AI_REPLIED"},
    ]
    assert latest_landlord_asked_for_phone(messages) is False

def test_latest_landlord_asked_for_phone_multiple_landlord_messages_latest_asks_phone():
    messages = [
        {"sender": "landlord", "text": "Hello!", "status": "AI_REPLIED"},
        {"sender": "tenant", "text": "Hi!", "status": "NEW_REPLY"},
        {"sender": "landlord", "text": "Please send your phone number.", "status": "CONTACT_REQUESTED"},
    ]
    assert latest_landlord_asked_for_phone(messages) is True

def test_latest_landlord_asked_for_phone_multiple_landlord_messages_latest_does_not_ask_phone():
    messages = [
        {"sender": "landlord", "text": "Please send your phone number.", "status": "CONTACT_REQUESTED"},
        {"sender": "tenant", "text": "Here it is.", "status": "PHONE_ACQUIRED"},
        {"sender": "landlord", "text": "Great, see you at the viewing.", "status": "VIEWING_BOOKED"},
    ]
    assert latest_landlord_asked_for_phone(messages) is False

from app.ai.conversation_memory import viewing_requested
from app.db.status import (
    INITIAL_MESSAGE_SENT,
    NEW_REPLY,
    AI_REPLIED,
    PHONE_ACQUIRED,
    AI_FAILED,
    REPLY_DISABLED,
    AGENT_SKIPPED,
    SKIPPED,
    DUPLICATE_LEAD,
    NEW_LEAD,
    VIEWING_DISCUSSION,
    VIEWING_BOOKED,
    PRE_VIEWING,
    CONTACT_REQUESTED,
    VIEWING_CANCELLED,
    HANDOFF_COMPLETE,
    CLOSED,
)
import pytest

def test_viewing_requested_with_empty_list():
    assert viewing_requested([]) is False

def test_viewing_requested_with_no_viewing_statuses():
    messages = [
        {"status": INITIAL_MESSAGE_SENT},
        {"status": NEW_REPLY},
        {"status": AI_REPLIED},
        {"status": PHONE_ACQUIRED},
    ]
    assert viewing_requested(messages) is False

def test_viewing_requested_with_viewing_discussion_status():
    messages = [
        {"status": INITIAL_MESSAGE_SENT},
        {"status": VIEWING_DISCUSSION},
        {"status": NEW_REPLY},
    ]
    assert viewing_requested(messages) is True

def test_viewing_requested_with_viewing_booked_status():
    messages = [
        {"status": VIEWING_BOOKED},
        {"status": AI_REPLIED},
    ]
    assert viewing_requested(messages) is True

def test_viewing_requested_with_contact_requested_status():
    messages = [
        {"status": CONTACT_REQUESTED},
        {"status": NEW_LEAD},
    ]
    assert viewing_requested(messages) is True

def test_viewing_requested_with_viewing_cancelled_and_closed_statuses():
    messages = [
        {"status": VIEWING_CANCELLED},
        {"status": CLOSED},
    ]
    assert viewing_requested(messages) is False

from app.ai.stages import detect_stage
from app.db.status import (
    INITIAL_MESSAGE_SENT,
    NEW_REPLY,
    AI_REPLIED,
    PHONE_ACQUIRED,
    AI_FAILED,
    REPLY_DISABLED,
    AGENT_SKIPPED,
    SKIPPED,
    DUPLICATE_LEAD,
    NEW_LEAD,
    VIEWING_DISCUSSION,
    VIEWING_BOOKED,
    PRE_VIEWING,
    CONTACT_REQUESTED,
    VIEWING_CANCELLED,
    HANDOFF_COMPLETE,
    CLOSED,
)
import pytest

def test_detect_stage_empty_messages():
    # No messages should return INITIAL_MESSAGE_SENT or similar initial stage
    result = detect_stage([])
    assert result == INITIAL_MESSAGE_SENT

def test_detect_stage_single_user_message():
    # One user message should indicate NEW_LEAD or NEW_REPLY stage
    messages = [{"sender": "user", "text": "Hello, I am interested."}]
    result = detect_stage(messages)
    assert result == NEW_LEAD

def test_detect_stage_ai_replied():
    # Messages with AI reply should return AI_REPLIED
    messages = [
        {"sender": "user", "text": "Is this still available?"},
        {"sender": "ai", "text": "Yes, it is available."}
    ]
    result = detect_stage(messages)
    assert result == AI_REPLIED

def test_detect_stage_phone_acquired():
    # Messages containing phone number acquisition should return PHONE_ACQUIRED
    messages = [
        {"sender": "user", "text": "Can I give you my phone?"},
        {"sender": "ai", "text": "Please provide your phone number."},
        {"sender": "user", "text": "My phone is 123-456-7890."}
    ]
    result = detect_stage(messages)
    assert result == PHONE_ACQUIRED

def test_detect_stage_viewing_booked():
    # Messages indicating a viewing booked should return VIEWING_BOOKED
    messages = [
        {"sender": "user", "text": "I want to book a viewing."},
        {"sender": "ai", "text": "Your viewing is booked for tomorrow at 3pm."}
    ]
    result = detect_stage(messages)
    assert result == VIEWING_BOOKED

def test_detect_stage_closed():
    # Messages indicating conversation closed should return CLOSED
    messages = [
        {"sender": "user", "text": "Thanks, no further questions."},
        {"sender": "ai", "text": "Closing this conversation now."}
    ]
    result = detect_stage(messages)
    assert result == CLOSED

from app.ai.conversation_memory import outbound_count
from app.db.status import (
    INITIAL_MESSAGE_SENT,
    NEW_REPLY,
    AI_REPLIED,
    PHONE_ACQUIRED,
    AI_FAILED,
    REPLY_DISABLED,
    AGENT_SKIPPED,
    SKIPPED,
    DUPLICATE_LEAD,
    NEW_LEAD,
    VIEWING_DISCUSSION,
    VIEWING_BOOKED,
    PRE_VIEWING,
    CONTACT_REQUESTED,
    VIEWING_CANCELLED,
    HANDOFF_COMPLETE,
    CLOSED,
)
import pytest

def test_outbound_count_empty_list():
    assert outbound_count([]) == 0

def test_outbound_count_only_inbound_messages():
    messages = [
        {"status": NEW_REPLY, "from_ai": False},
        {"status": REPLY_DISABLED, "from_ai": False},
        {"status": VIEWING_DISCUSSION, "from_ai": False},
    ]
    assert outbound_count(messages) == 0

def test_outbound_count_only_outbound_messages():
    messages = [
        {"status": INITIAL_MESSAGE_SENT, "from_ai": True},
        {"status": AI_REPLIED, "from_ai": True},
        {"status": PHONE_ACQUIRED, "from_ai": True},
    ]
    assert outbound_count(messages) == 3

def test_outbound_count_mixed_messages():
    messages = [
        {"status": INITIAL_MESSAGE_SENT, "from_ai": True},
        {"status": NEW_REPLY, "from_ai": False},
        {"status": AI_REPLIED, "from_ai": True},
        {"status": VIEWING_DISCUSSION, "from_ai": False},
        {"status": PHONE_ACQUIRED, "from_ai": True},
        {"status": REPLY_DISABLED, "from_ai": False},
    ]
    assert outbound_count(messages) == 3

def test_outbound_count_ignores_non_outbound_statuses_even_if_from_ai():
    messages = [
        {"status": AI_FAILED, "from_ai": True},
        {"status": AGENT_SKIPPED, "from_ai": True},
        {"status": SKIPPED, "from_ai": True},
        {"status": DUPLICATE_LEAD, "from_ai": True},
        {"status": NEW_LEAD, "from_ai": True},
        {"status": HANDOFF_COMPLETE, "from_ai": True},
        {"status": CLOSED, "from_ai": True},
    ]
    # Assuming these statuses do not count as outbound messages
    assert outbound_count(messages) == 0

def test_outbound_count_counts_only_messages_with_from_ai_true():
    messages = [
        {"status": INITIAL_MESSAGE_SENT, "from_ai": True},
        {"status": INITIAL_MESSAGE_SENT, "from_ai": False},
        {"status": AI_REPLIED, "from_ai": True},
        {"status": AI_REPLIED, "from_ai": False},
    ]
    assert outbound_count(messages) == 2

from app.ai.stages import detect_stage
from app.db.status import (
    INITIAL_MESSAGE_SENT,
    NEW_REPLY,
    AI_REPLIED,
    PHONE_ACQUIRED,
    AI_FAILED,
    REPLY_DISABLED,
    AGENT_SKIPPED,
    SKIPPED,
    DUPLICATE_LEAD,
    NEW_LEAD,
    VIEWING_DISCUSSION,
    VIEWING_BOOKED,
    PRE_VIEWING,
    CONTACT_REQUESTED,
    VIEWING_CANCELLED,
    HANDOFF_COMPLETE,
    CLOSED,
)
import pytest

def test_detect_stage_empty_messages():
    # No messages should return INITIAL_MESSAGE_SENT or similar initial stage
    result = detect_stage([])
    assert result == INITIAL_MESSAGE_SENT

def test_detect_stage_single_user_message():
    # One user message should result in NEW_REPLY stage
    messages = [{"sender": "user", "text": "Hello"}]
    result = detect_stage(messages)
    assert result == NEW_REPLY

def test_detect_stage_ai_replied():
    # Messages with AI reply should return AI_REPLIED
    messages = [
        {"sender": "user", "text": "Hello"},
        {"sender": "ai", "text": "Hi, how can I help?"}
    ]
    result = detect_stage(messages)
    assert result == AI_REPLIED

def test_detect_stage_phone_acquired():
    # Messages containing phone acquisition info should return PHONE_ACQUIRED
    messages = [
        {"sender": "user", "text": "My phone number is 1234567890"},
        {"sender": "ai", "text": "Thanks for the number."}
    ]
    result = detect_stage(messages)
    assert result == PHONE_ACQUIRED

def test_detect_stage_ai_failed():
    # Messages indicating AI failure should return AI_FAILED
    messages = [
        {"sender": "user", "text": "Unclear input"},
        {"sender": "ai", "text": "Sorry, I didn't understand that."}
    ]
    result = detect_stage(messages)
    assert result == AI_FAILED

def test_detect_stage_closed():
    # Messages indicating conversation closed should return CLOSED
    messages = [
        {"sender": "user", "text": "Thanks, goodbye."},
        {"sender": "ai", "text": "Conversation closed."}
    ]
    result = detect_stage(messages)
    assert result == CLOSED

from datetime import datetime, timedelta
import pytest
from app.ai.stages import extract_viewing_datetime
from app.db.status import (
    INITIAL_MESSAGE_SENT, NEW_REPLY, AI_REPLIED, PHONE_ACQUIRED, AI_FAILED,
    REPLY_DISABLED, AGENT_SKIPPED, SKIPPED, DUPLICATE_LEAD, NEW_LEAD,
    VIEWING_DISCUSSION, VIEWING_BOOKED, PRE_VIEWING, CONTACT_REQUESTED,
    VIEWING_CANCELLED, HANDOFF_COMPLETE, CLOSED
)

def test_extract_viewing_datetime_no_messages_returns_none():
    result = extract_viewing_datetime([])
    assert result is None

def test_extract_viewing_datetime_with_viewing_booked_status_returns_datetime():
    now = datetime(2024, 6, 1, 12, 0)
    messages = [
        {"status": INITIAL_MESSAGE_SENT, "timestamp": now - timedelta(days=2)},
        {"status": VIEWING_BOOKED, "timestamp": now + timedelta(days=3)},
        {"status": NEW_REPLY, "timestamp": now - timedelta(days=1)},
    ]
    result = extract_viewing_datetime(messages, now=now)
    assert result == now + timedelta(days=3)

def test_extract_viewing_datetime_with_multiple_viewing_booked_returns_earliest():
    now = datetime(2024, 6, 1, 12, 0)
    messages = [
        {"status": VIEWING_BOOKED, "timestamp": now + timedelta(days=5)},
        {"status": VIEWING_BOOKED, "timestamp": now + timedelta(days=2)},
        {"status": VIEWING_BOOKED, "timestamp": now + timedelta(days=10)},
    ]
    result = extract_viewing_datetime(messages, now=now)
    assert result == now + timedelta(days=2)

def test_extract_viewing_datetime_with_no_viewing_booked_returns_none():
    now = datetime(2024, 6, 1, 12, 0)
    messages = [
        {"status": NEW_REPLY, "timestamp": now - timedelta(days=1)},
        {"status": AI_REPLIED, "timestamp": now - timedelta(days=2)},
        {"status": CONTACT_REQUESTED, "timestamp": now - timedelta(days=3)},
    ]
    result = extract_viewing_datetime(messages, now=now)
    assert result is None

def test_extract_viewing_datetime_with_viewing_cancelled_ignores_cancelled():
    now = datetime(2024, 6, 1, 12, 0)
    messages = [
        {"status": VIEWING_BOOKED, "timestamp": now + timedelta(days=4)},
        {"status": VIEWING_CANCELLED, "timestamp": now + timedelta(days=2)},
    ]
    result = extract_viewing_datetime(messages, now=now)
    assert result == now + timedelta(days=4)

def test_extract_viewing_datetime_with_pre_viewing_status_returns_none():
    now = datetime(2024, 6, 1, 12, 0)
    messages = [
        {"status": PRE_VIEWING, "timestamp": now + timedelta(days=1)},
    ]
    result = extract_viewing_datetime(messages, now=now)
    assert result is None

from datetime import datetime, timedelta
import pytest
from app.ai.stages import extract_viewing_datetime
from app.db.status import (
    INITIAL_MESSAGE_SENT,
    NEW_REPLY,
    AI_REPLIED,
    PHONE_ACQUIRED,
    AI_FAILED,
    REPLY_DISABLED,
    AGENT_SKIPPED,
    SKIPPED,
    DUPLICATE_LEAD,
    NEW_LEAD,
    VIEWING_DISCUSSION,
    VIEWING_BOOKED,
    PRE_VIEWING,
    CONTACT_REQUESTED,
    VIEWING_CANCELLED,
    HANDOFF_COMPLETE,
    CLOSED,
)

def test_extract_viewing_datetime_no_messages_returns_none():
    result = extract_viewing_datetime([])
    assert result is None

def test_extract_viewing_datetime_with_viewing_booked_status_returns_expected_datetime():
    now = datetime(2024, 6, 1, 12, 0)
    messages = [
        {"status": INITIAL_MESSAGE_SENT, "timestamp": "2024-05-30T10:00:00Z"},
        {"status": VIEWING_BOOKED, "timestamp": "2024-06-01T15:30:00Z"},
        {"status": NEW_REPLY, "timestamp": "2024-06-01T16:00:00Z"},
    ]
    result = extract_viewing_datetime(messages, now=now)
    expected = datetime(2024, 6, 1, 15, 30)
    assert result == expected

def test_extract_viewing_datetime_with_multiple_viewing_booked_returns_latest_datetime():
    now = datetime(2024, 6, 1, 12, 0)
    messages = [
        {"status": VIEWING_BOOKED, "timestamp": "2024-06-01T14:00:00Z"},
        {"status": VIEWING_BOOKED, "timestamp": "2024-06-01T16:00:00Z"},
        {"status": VIEWING_BOOKED, "timestamp": "2024-06-01T15:00:00Z"},
    ]
    result = extract_viewing_datetime(messages, now=now)
    expected = datetime(2024, 6, 1, 16, 0)
    assert result == expected

def test_extract_viewing_datetime_with_no_viewing_booked_status_returns_none():
    messages = [
        {"status": INITIAL_MESSAGE_SENT, "timestamp": "2024-05-30T10:00:00Z"},
        {"status": NEW_REPLY, "timestamp": "2024-06-01T16:00:00Z"},
        {"status": AI_REPLIED, "timestamp": "2024-06-01T16:30:00Z"},
    ]
    result = extract_viewing_datetime(messages)
    assert result is None

def test_extract_viewing_datetime_handles_pre_viewing_status():
    messages = [
        {"status": PRE_VIEWING, "timestamp": "2024-06-01T09:00:00Z"},
        {"status": VIEWING_BOOKED, "timestamp": "2024-06-01T11:00:00Z"},
    ]
    result = extract_viewing_datetime(messages)
    expected = datetime(2024, 6, 1, 11, 0)
    assert result == expected

def test_extract_viewing_datetime_with_viewing_cancelled_returns_none():
    messages = [
        {"status": VIEWING_BOOKED, "timestamp": "2024-06-01T11:00:00Z"},
        {"status": VIEWING_CANCELLED, "timestamp": "2024-06-01T12:00:00Z"},
    ]
    result = extract_viewing_datetime(messages)
    assert result is None

from app.ai.personas import should_share_phone_now
from app.db.status import (
    INITIAL_MESSAGE_SENT,
    NEW_REPLY,
    AI_REPLIED,
    PHONE_ACQUIRED,
    REPLY_DISABLED,
    AGENT_SKIPPED,
    SKIPPED,
    DUPLICATE_LEAD,
    NEW_LEAD,
    VIEWING_DISCUSSION,
    VIEWING_BOOKED,
    PRE_VIEWING,
    CONTACT_REQUESTED,
    VIEWING_CANCELLED,
    HANDOFF_COMPLETE,
    CLOSED,
)


def test_should_share_phone_now_when_phone_already_shared():
    result = should_share_phone_now("buyer", phone_shared=True)
    assert result is False


def test_should_share_phone_now_when_landlord_asked():
    result = should_share_phone_now("tenant", landlord_asked=True)
    assert result is True


def test_should_share_phone_now_at_contact_requested_stage():
    result = should_share_phone_now("renter", stage=CONTACT_REQUESTED)
    assert result is True


def test_should_share_phone_now_with_high_outbound_count_and_no_phone_shared():
    result = should_share_phone_now("agent", outbound_count=5, phone_shared=False)
    assert result is True


def test_should_share_phone_now_when_stage_is_closed():
    result = should_share_phone_now("buyer", stage=CLOSED)
    assert result is False


def test_should_share_phone_now_when_drive_distance_high_and_no_phone_shared():
    result = should_share_phone_now("tenant", drive_distance_high=True, phone_shared=False)
    assert result is True

from app.ai.conversation_memory import phone_shared_state
from app.db.status import (
    INITIAL_MESSAGE_SENT,
    NEW_REPLY,
    AI_REPLIED,
    PHONE_ACQUIRED,
    AI_FAILED,
    REPLY_DISABLED,
    AGENT_SKIPPED,
    SKIPPED,
    DUPLICATE_LEAD,
    NEW_LEAD,
    VIEWING_DISCUSSION,
    VIEWING_BOOKED,
    PRE_VIEWING,
    CONTACT_REQUESTED,
    VIEWING_CANCELLED,
    HANDOFF_COMPLETE,
    CLOSED,
)
import pytest

def test_phone_shared_state_initial_message():
    messages = [{"sender": "user", "text": "Hello"}]
    persona = {"id": 1, "name": "Agent"}
    result = phone_shared_state(messages, persona)
    assert result == INITIAL_MESSAGE_SENT

def test_phone_shared_state_phone_acquired():
    messages = [
        {"sender": "user", "text": "Can I give you my phone number?"},
        {"sender": "agent", "text": "Yes, please share it."},
    ]
    persona = {"id": 2, "name": "Agent"}
    result = phone_shared_state(messages, persona)
    assert result == PHONE_ACQUIRED

def test_phone_shared_state_ai_failed_on_empty_messages():
    messages = []
    persona = {"id": 3, "name": "Agent"}
    result = phone_shared_state(messages, persona)
    assert result == AI_FAILED

def test_phone_shared_state_new_reply_with_conversation():
    messages = [
        {"sender": "user", "text": "Is the viewing still available?"},
        {"sender": "agent", "text": "Yes, it is."},
    ]
    persona = {"id": 4, "name": "Agent"}
    conversation = {"status": NEW_REPLY}
    result = phone_shared_state(messages, persona, conversation)
    assert result == NEW_REPLY

def test_phone_shared_state_closed_status():
    messages = [
        {"sender": "user", "text": "Thanks for your help."},
        {"sender": "agent", "text": "You're welcome!"},
    ]
    persona = {"id": 5, "name": "Agent"}
    conversation = {"status": CLOSED}
    result = phone_shared_state(messages, persona, conversation)
    assert result == CLOSED

def test_phone_shared_state_reply_disabled_when_no_persona():
    messages = [{"sender": "user", "text": "Hello?"}]
    persona = None
    result = phone_shared_state(messages, persona)
    assert result == REPLY_DISABLED

from app.ai.conversation_memory import outbound_count
from app.db.status import (
    INITIAL_MESSAGE_SENT,
    NEW_REPLY,
    AI_REPLIED,
    PHONE_ACQUIRED,
    AI_FAILED,
    REPLY_DISABLED,
    AGENT_SKIPPED,
    SKIPPED,
    DUPLICATE_LEAD,
    NEW_LEAD,
    VIEWING_DISCUSSION,
    VIEWING_BOOKED,
    PRE_VIEWING,
    CONTACT_REQUESTED,
    VIEWING_CANCELLED,
    HANDOFF_COMPLETE,
    CLOSED,
)
import pytest

def test_outbound_count_empty_list():
    assert outbound_count([]) == 0

def test_outbound_count_only_inbound_messages():
    # Assuming inbound messages have statuses like NEW_REPLY or AI_REPLIED
    messages = [
        {"status": NEW_REPLY},
        {"status": AI_REPLIED},
        {"status": VIEWING_DISCUSSION},
    ]
    assert outbound_count(messages) == 0

def test_outbound_count_single_outbound_message():
    # Assuming INITIAL_MESSAGE_SENT is outbound
    messages = [
        {"status": INITIAL_MESSAGE_SENT},
    ]
    assert outbound_count(messages) == 1

def test_outbound_count_multiple_outbound_messages():
    messages = [
        {"status": INITIAL_MESSAGE_SENT},
        {"status": PHONE_ACQUIRED},
        {"status": NEW_LEAD},
        {"status": AI_FAILED},  # Possibly outbound as AI failed to respond
        {"status": REPLY_DISABLED},  # Possibly outbound
        {"status": NEW_REPLY},  # inbound
        {"status": VIEWING_BOOKED},  # inbound or neutral
    ]
    # Assuming outbound statuses are INITIAL_MESSAGE_SENT, PHONE_ACQUIRED, NEW_LEAD, AI_FAILED, REPLY_DISABLED
    assert outbound_count(messages) == 5

def test_outbound_count_ignores_skipped_and_closed():
    messages = [
        {"status": SKIPPED},
        {"status": AGENT_SKIPPED},
        {"status": CLOSED},
        {"status": HANDOFF_COMPLETE},
    ]
    # Assuming these are not outbound messages
    assert outbound_count(messages) == 0

def test_outbound_count_mixed_messages():
    messages = [
        {"status": INITIAL_MESSAGE_SENT},
        {"status": NEW_REPLY},
        {"status": AI_REPLIED},
        {"status": PHONE_ACQUIRED},
        {"status": VIEWING_CANCELLED},
        {"status": NEW_LEAD},
        {"status": DUPLICATE_LEAD},
        {"status": REPLY_DISABLED},
    ]
    # Assuming outbound are INITIAL_MESSAGE_SENT, PHONE_ACQUIRED, NEW_LEAD, REPLY_DISABLED
    # DUPLICATE_LEAD likely not outbound
    assert outbound_count(messages) == 4

from datetime import datetime, timedelta
import pytest
from app.ai.stages import extract_viewing_datetime
from app.db.status import (
    INITIAL_MESSAGE_SENT,
    NEW_REPLY,
    AI_REPLIED,
    PHONE_ACQUIRED,
    AI_FAILED,
    REPLY_DISABLED,
    AGENT_SKIPPED,
    SKIPPED,
    DUPLICATE_LEAD,
    NEW_LEAD,
    VIEWING_DISCUSSION,
    VIEWING_BOOKED,
    PRE_VIEWING,
    CONTACT_REQUESTED,
    VIEWING_CANCELLED,
    HANDOFF_COMPLETE,
    CLOSED,
)

def test_extract_viewing_datetime_no_messages_returns_none():
    result = extract_viewing_datetime([])
    assert result is None

def test_extract_viewing_datetime_with_viewing_booked_status_returns_datetime():
    now = datetime(2024, 6, 1, 12, 0)
    messages = [
        {"status": NEW_LEAD, "text": "Lead created", "created_at": now - timedelta(days=2)},
        {"status": VIEWING_BOOKED, "text": "Viewing booked for 2024-06-10 15:00", "created_at": now - timedelta(days=1)},
    ]
    expected = datetime(2024, 6, 10, 15, 0)
    result = extract_viewing_datetime(messages, now=now)
    assert result == expected

def test_extract_viewing_datetime_with_multiple_viewing_booked_returns_latest():
    now = datetime(2024, 6, 1, 12, 0)
    messages = [
        {"status": VIEWING_BOOKED, "text": "Viewing booked for 2024-06-10 15:00", "created_at": now - timedelta(days=3)},
        {"status": VIEWING_BOOKED, "text": "Viewing booked for 2024-06-12 10:00", "created_at": now - timedelta(days=1)},
    ]
    expected = datetime(2024, 6, 12, 10, 0)
    result = extract_viewing_datetime(messages, now=now)
    assert result == expected

def test_extract_viewing_datetime_ignores_non_viewing_statuses():
    now = datetime(2024, 6, 1, 12, 0)
    messages = [
        {"status": NEW_LEAD, "text": "Lead created", "created_at": now - timedelta(days=2)},
        {"status": AI_REPLIED, "text": "AI replied", "created_at": now - timedelta(days=1)},
    ]
    result = extract_viewing_datetime(messages, now=now)
    assert result is None

def test_extract_viewing_datetime_with_viewing_cancelled_returns_none():
    now = datetime(2024, 6, 1, 12, 0)
    messages = [
        {"status": VIEWING_BOOKED, "text": "Viewing booked for 2024-06-10 15:00", "created_at": now - timedelta(days=3)},
        {"status": VIEWING_CANCELLED, "text": "Viewing cancelled", "created_at": now - timedelta(days=1)},
    ]
    result = extract_viewing_datetime(messages, now=now)
    assert result is None

def test_extract_viewing_datetime_with_pre_viewing_status_returns_datetime():
    now = datetime(2024, 6, 1, 12, 0)
    messages = [
        {"status": PRE_VIEWING, "text": "Pre viewing scheduled for 2024-06-05 09:00", "created_at": now - timedelta(days=1)},
    ]
    expected = datetime(2024, 6, 5, 9, 0)
    result = extract_viewing_datetime(messages, now=now)
    assert result == expected

from app.ai.stages import detect_stage
from app.db.status import (
    INITIAL_MESSAGE_SENT,
    NEW_REPLY,
    AI_REPLIED,
    PHONE_ACQUIRED,
    AI_FAILED,
    REPLY_DISABLED,
    AGENT_SKIPPED,
    SKIPPED,
    DUPLICATE_LEAD,
    NEW_LEAD,
    VIEWING_DISCUSSION,
    VIEWING_BOOKED,
    PRE_VIEWING,
    CONTACT_REQUESTED,
    VIEWING_CANCELLED,
    HANDOFF_COMPLETE,
    CLOSED,
import pytest


def test_detect_stage_empty_messages():
    # No messages should return INITIAL_MESSAGE_SENT or similar initial stage
    result = detect_stage([])
    assert result == INITIAL_MESSAGE_SENT


def test_detect_stage_single_user_message():
    # Single user message should indicate NEW_LEAD or NEW_REPLY
    messages = [{"sender": "user", "text": "Hello, I am interested"}]
    result = detect_stage(messages)
    assert result == NEW_LEAD


def test_detect_stage_ai_replied_message():
    # Messages with AI reply should return AI_REPLIED
    messages = [
        {"sender": "user", "text": "Hello"},
        {"sender": "ai", "text": "Hi, how can I help?"}
    ]
    result = detect_stage(messages)
    assert result == AI_REPLIED


def test_detect_stage_phone_acquired():
    # Messages containing phone number acquisition should return PHONE_ACQUIRED
    messages = [
        {"sender": "user", "text": "My phone is 123-456-7890"},
        {"sender": "ai", "text": "Thanks for providing your phone number."}
    ]
    result = detect_stage(messages)
    assert result == PHONE_ACQUIRED


def test_detect_stage_viewing_booked():
    # Messages indicating a viewing booked should return VIEWING_BOOKED
    messages = [
        {"sender": "user", "text": "Can I book a viewing for tomorrow?"},
        {"sender": "ai", "text": "Your viewing is booked for tomorrow at 3pm."}
    ]
    result = detect_stage(messages)
    assert result == VIEWING_BOOKED


def test_detect_stage_closed():
    # Messages indicating conversation closed should return CLOSED
    messages = [
        {"sender": "user", "text": "Thanks, I am no longer interested."},
        {"sender": "ai", "text": "Understood, closing the conversation."}
    ]
    result = detect_stage(messages)
    assert result == CLOSED

from app.ai.conversation_memory import landlord_messages
from app.db.status import (
    INITIAL_MESSAGE_SENT,
    NEW_REPLY,
    AI_REPLIED,
    PHONE_ACQUIRED,
    AI_FAILED,
    REPLY_DISABLED,
    AGENT_SKIPPED,
    SKIPPED,
    DUPLICATE_LEAD,
    NEW_LEAD,
    VIEWING_DISCUSSION,
    VIEWING_BOOKED,
    PRE_VIEWING,
    CONTACT_REQUESTED,
    VIEWING_CANCELLED,
    HANDOFF_COMPLETE,
    CLOSED,
)
import pytest

def test_landlord_messages_empty_list():
    result = landlord_messages([])
    assert result == []

def test_landlord_messages_single_initial_message():
    messages = [{"status": INITIAL_MESSAGE_SENT, "text": "Hello, is the flat available?"}]
    result = landlord_messages(messages)
    assert isinstance(result, list)
    assert len(result) == 1
    assert result[0]["status"] == INITIAL_MESSAGE_SENT
    assert "Hello" in result[0]["text"]

def test_landlord_messages_multiple_statuses():
    messages = [
        {"status": INITIAL_MESSAGE_SENT, "text": "Is the flat still available?"},
        {"status": NEW_REPLY, "text": "Yes, it is."},
        {"status": AI_REPLIED, "text": "I can schedule a viewing."},
        {"status": PHONE_ACQUIRED, "text": "My phone number is 123456789."},
    ]
    result = landlord_messages(messages)
    assert len(result) == 4
    assert result[1]["status"] == NEW_REPLY
    assert result[2]["status"] == AI_REPLIED
    assert result[3]["status"] == PHONE_ACQUIRED

def test_landlord_messages_handles_skipped_and_failed():
    messages = [
        {"status": AGENT_SKIPPED, "text": "Agent skipped this lead."},
        {"status": AI_FAILED, "text": "AI failed to respond."},
        {"status": SKIPPED, "text": "Message skipped."},
    ]
    result = landlord_messages(messages)
    assert any(m["status"] == AGENT_SKIPPED for m in result)
    assert any(m["status"] == AI_FAILED for m in result)
    assert any(m["status"] == SKIPPED for m in result)

def test_landlord_messages_viewing_and_closed_statuses():
    messages = [
        {"status": VIEWING_BOOKED, "text": "Viewing booked for next week."},
        {"status": VIEWING_CANCELLED, "text": "Viewing cancelled by tenant."},
        {"status": CLOSED, "text": "Conversation closed."},
    ]
    result = landlord_messages(messages)
    statuses = [m["status"] for m in result]
    assert VIEWING_BOOKED in statuses
    assert VIEWING_CANCELLED in statuses
    assert CLOSED in statuses

def test_landlord_messages_returns_new_lead_and_duplicate_lead():
    messages = [
        {"status": NEW_LEAD, "text": "New lead created."},
        {"status": DUPLICATE_LEAD, "text": "Duplicate lead detected."},
    ]
    result = landlord_messages(messages)
    assert any(m["status"] == NEW_LEAD for m in result)
    assert any(m["status"] == DUPLICATE_LEAD for m in result)
